phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as estátuas dos reis?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH SHTAH-toouhsh DOOSH RAYSH?

likely_response.local: Siga os canteiros geométricos até às estátuas.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh OOSH kahnng-TAY-roosh zheeoo-MEHT-ree-koosh uh-TEH UHUHSH SHTAH-toouhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the geometric flowerbeds to the statues.

responses.english: Follow the geometric flowerbeds to the statues.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh OOSH kahnng-TAY-roosh zheeoo-MEHT-ree-koosh uh-TEH UHUHSH SHTAH-toouhsh.
responses.local: Siga os canteiros geométricos até às estátuas.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o miradouro da Sé?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUH SEH?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao guia turístico local ou ao kiosqueiro do jardim; eles podem indicar o caminho.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo loo-KAHL OHW OW keeoosh-KAY-roo DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN; EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AW kuh-MEE-nyoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the local tour guide or the garden kiosk attendant; they can point the way.

responses.english: Ask the local tour guide or the garden kiosk attendant; they can point the way.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo loo-KAHL OHW OW keeoosh-KAY-roo DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN; EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AW kuh-MEE-nyoo.
responses.local: Pergunte ao guia turístico local ou ao kiosqueiro do jardim; eles podem indicar o caminho.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the kings statues are
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar as estátuas dos reis?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR UHSH SHTAH-toouhsh DOOSH RAYSH?
phrases.cultural_note: As estátuas dos reis são uma das atrações históricas do jardim, representando monarcas portugueses.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as Estátuas dos Reis.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH SHTAH-toouhsh DOOSH RAYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Kings' Statues.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Kings' Statues.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH SHTAH-toouhsh DOOSH RAYSH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para as Estátuas dos Reis.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the geometric flower beds are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam os canteiros geométricos do jardim?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FEE-kow oos kahn-TAY-roosh zhee-oh-MEH-tree-kooz DOO zhar-DZEEN
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese formal gardens prioritize symmetrical paths; staff typically reference central water features.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, ficam junto à fonte principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuhng ZHOONNG-too AH FOHNG-tih preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, they are next to the main fountain.

responses.english: Good morning, they are next to the main fountain.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuhng ZHOONNG-too AH FOHNG-tih preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, ficam junto à fonte principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the access stairs are
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza a escadaria de acesso?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH DIH uh-SEH-soo?
phrases.cultural_note: Historic Braga uses staircases to connect elevated religious sites with lower public squares.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as placas para a Escadaria de acesso.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH DIH uh-SEH-soo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the signs to the Access Stairs.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the signs to the Access Stairs.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH DIH uh-SEH-soo.
responses.local: Bom dia, siga as placas para a Escadaria de acesso.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the geometric flower beds are
phrases.cultural_note: Os canteiros geométricos são característicos dos jardins formais portugueses, com desenhos simétricos.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para os canteiros geométricos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH kahnng-TAY-roosh zheeoo-MEHT-ree-koosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the geometric flower beds.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the geometric flower beds.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH kahnng-TAY-roosh zheeoo-MEHT-ree-koosh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para os canteiros geométricos.
